queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating impact of extended loan duration in months on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings at least 1000 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: the role of substantial savings accounts exceeding 1000 DM in reducing credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: the contribution of absent checking accounts to elevated default probability in consumer lending.
